page: Microsoft Azure M208ms_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSv2 family, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. It features 208 vCPUs mapped to 104 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8280L processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The server is equipped with 5700.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 27.4 GB per core. It also includes 4194 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Benchmark results reveal a clear tradeoff between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core CPU performance and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the bottom 25%. However, the massive core count enables top-tier multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression ranking in the top 10%. Memory bandwidth is exceptionally strong, with read-only small and large block operations reaching top-tier status. Redis SET operations also perform in the top 10%, highlighting its efficiency for in-memory data structures, though Passmark memory scores are relatively weak.

Given its massive memory capacity and high virtual core count, the M208ms_v2 offers high resource density for enterprise-scale deployments. The qualitative cost profile reflects its position as a specialized, high-capacity instance where consolidation of massive databases is preferred over multiple smaller nodes. This server is best suited for large-scale in-memory databases like SAP HANA, heavy relational database management systems, big data analytics, and highly parallelized enterprise workloads that require massive memory footprints.
description: Microsoft Azure M208ms_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSv2 family, featuring 208 vCPUs (104 physical cores) powered by Intel Xeon 8280L processors at 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with an extensive 5700.0 GB of RAM, translating to 27.4 GB per core, alongside 4194 GB of local storage. While single-core benchmarks like Geekbench and stress-ng rank in the bottom 25%, the server excels in multi-threaded operations, with stress-ng multi-core performance and memory read bandwidth placing in the top 10%. Redis SET operations also achieve top-tier throughput. This high-density configuration is designed for massive memory-intensive workloads, making it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise relational databases, and complex parallel data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M208ms_v2 is a memory-optimized server with 208 vCPUs, 5700 GB RAM, and 4194 GB local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and memory bandwidth performance for enterprise databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M208ms_v2 is a memory-optimized VM featuring 208 vCPUs, 5.7 TB RAM, and 4.1 TB local storage for large-scale enterprise databases.
tagline: A massive memory-optimized virtual machine delivering 5.7 TB of RAM and 208 vCPUs for enterprise-scale in-memory database workloads.
bullet_points: 208 vCPUs and 104 physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8280L processors
5700.0 GB of RAM providing 27.4 GB per core for memory-intensive tasks
4194 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier multi-core performance and memory read bandwidth
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise workloads
